raw_comment:
I noticed that Alaska and Hawaii are not on the map! My honest inference would be that Hawaii might come first and Alaska might come last. In other words, I think this because Alaska is the coldest state in the country and Hawaii is one of the warmest and nicest states in the country. 

Please reply if you have any other inferences, on why they might not be on the map! 

My title is: Flowers Blooming Across 48 States!
